name: claude-mcp-trello
description: Board-scoped Trello MCP server with 29 tools for cards, lists, labels, checklists, custom fields, attachments, members, comments, search, and activity. Single-board by default, with optional allowed-boards mode, input validation, audit logging, rate limiting, and read-only mode.

trello_api_key.title: Trello API Key
trello_api_key.description: Your Trello API key from https://trello.com/power-ups/admin

trello_token.title: Trello Token
trello_token.description: Your Trello API token (generate from the Power-Up admin page)

trello_board_id.title: Primary Trello Board ID
trello_board_id.description: 24-character hex ID of the default board to operate on. Get it from the Trello API: https://api.trello.com/1/boards/SHORT_ID?fields=id&key=KEY&token=TOKEN

trello_allowed_board_ids.title: Additional Allowed Board IDs
trello_allowed_board_ids.description: Optional comma-separated list of extra Trello board IDs the server may access. The primary board is always included automatically.

trello_read_only.title: Read-Only Mode
trello_read_only.description: Set to 'true' to disable all write operations (optional)
